TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jean-Claude_Juncker, title = Jean-Claude_Juncker, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jean-Claude_Juncker} }

S.FORM: Jean-Claude Juncker Jean-Claude Juncker (ryax sa 9 na byacing tay 12 squ kawas na 1954 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1954) mrhuw Luxembourg ta' kawas na 1995 - kawas na 2013 hya' ga Jean-Claude Juncker, aring ryax tay 20 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 1995 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Jean-Claude Juncker minkahul sa Redange na Japan. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1954 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' List of prime ministers of Luxembourg canpyuta hknyun

Jean-Claude Juncker Jean-Claude Juncker (ryax sa 9 na byacing tay 12 squ kawas na 1954 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1954) mrhuw Luxembourg ta' kawas na 1995 - kawas na 2013 hya' ga Jean-Claude Juncker, aring ryax tay 20 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 1995 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Jean-Claude Juncker minkahul sa Redange na Japan. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1954 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' List of prime ministers of Luxembourg canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: *ean-ʦ~ʨlau*e *unʦ~ʨker *ean-ʦ~ʨlau*e *unʦ~ʨker (rjax s~ɕa * na βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ na **** - mis~ɕuw ), ħja ɣa s~ɕquliq na pklaħaŋ ɣaɣa. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw luxemβourɣ taʔ kawas~ɕ na **** - kawas~ɕ na **** ħjaʔ ɣa *ean-ʦ~ʨlau*e *unʦ~ʨker, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral *ean-ʦ~ʨlau*e *unʦ~ʨker minkaħul s~ɕa re*aŋe na *apan. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕt o* prime minis~ɕters~ɕ o* luxemβourɣ ʦ~ʨanpjuta ħknjun
